notes: Master background variant catalog for ad generation. Use id for tracking and dedupe. No repeat until all slots for a format are exhausted.
deduplication_rule: HARD BLOCK — no slot may repeat for a given format until ALL slots allowed for that format have been used. Track per format in registry slot_exhaustion_tracker.
